purpose: Answers: 'How good was the drone's contribution to this survey?' Combines image capture, rover GNSS, and mission execution into a single 0–100 score.
global_gate_condition: image_capture_score == 0 (i.e. image_validity_score < 30 triggered the BB_IMG_CAPTURE internal gate)
global_gate_action: Sets drone_score = 0. All downstream processing stops. Raises FLAG: DRONE_CRITICAL_FAILURE.
scope_note: drone_score feeds into capture_score alongside base_station_score, gcp_score, and processing_score.
source_file_set: Pilot delivers: (1) raw images (SRC_IMG_01), (2) Rover RINEX (SRC_GNSS_01), (3) ArduPilot .BIN (SRC_FC_BIN), (4) JSON metadata form with 2 fields (SRC_UI_01). Pipeline auto-fetches Open-Meteo API (SRC_API_01). Camera calibration (SRC_IMG_02) resolved automatically by ODM.
